name: Tool Performance
query:
SELECT
    tp.name AS "ID:Link/Tool Performance:120",
    tp.customer_name AS "Customer:Data:180",
    tp.engineer_name AS "Engineer:Data:180",
    t.tool_label AS "Trial details:Data:180",

    MAX(CASE WHEN td.parameter_name = 'HOLDER/CUTTER SPECIFICATION' THEN t.value END) AS "HOLDER/CUTTER SPECIFICATION:Data:180",
    MAX(CASE WHEN td.parameter_name = 'UNIT PRICE' THEN t.value END) AS "UNIT PRICE:Currency:120",
    MAX(CASE WHEN td.parameter_name = 'CUTTING SPEED(M/MIN)' THEN t.value END) AS "CUTTING SPEED(M/MIN):Float:160",
    MAX(CASE WHEN td.parameter_name = 'MATERIAL' THEN t.value END) AS "MATERIAL:Data:100",
    MAX(CASE WHEN td.parameter_name = 'MONTHLY QTY(In Nos)' THEN t.value END) AS "MONTHLY QTY(In Nos):Int:160",
    MAX(CASE WHEN td.parameter_name = 'TOOL SPECIFICATION' THEN t.value END) AS "TOOL SPECIFICATION:Data:220",
    MAX(CASE WHEN td.parameter_name = 'SPINDLE SPEED(RPM)' THEN t.value END) AS "SPINDLE SPEED(RPM):Int:160",
    MAX(CASE WHEN td.parameter_name = 'CYCLE TIME (In seconds)' THEN t.value END) AS "CYCLE TIME (In seconds):Int:180",
    MAX(CASE WHEN td.parameter_name = 'DEPTH OF CUT(MM)' THEN t.value END) AS "DEPTH OF CUT(MM):Float:160",
    MAX(CASE WHEN td.parameter_name = 'NO. OF PASS' THEN t.value END) AS "NO. OF PASS:Int:140",
    MAX(CASE WHEN td.parameter_name = 'NO OF CORNER (n)' THEN t.value END) AS "NO OF CORNER (n):Int:160",
    MAX(CASE WHEN td.parameter_name = 'LIFE PER CORNER (In Nos)' THEN t.value END) AS "LIFE PER CORNER (In Nos):Int:180",
    MAX(CASE WHEN td.parameter_name = 'COST PER COMPONENT (In INR)' THEN t.value END) AS "COST PER COMPONENT (In INR):Currency:200",
    MAX(CASE WHEN td.parameter_name = 'Monthly Value' THEN t.value END) AS "Monthly Value:Currency:160",
    MAX(CASE WHEN td.parameter_name = 'NO OF POCKET (Z)' THEN t.value END) AS "NO OF POCKET (Z):Int:160",
    MAX(CASE WHEN td.parameter_name = 'FEED' THEN t.value END) AS "FEED:Float:120",
    MAX(CASE WHEN td.parameter_name = 'TOOL SUPPLIER' THEN t.value END) AS "TOOL SUPPLIER:Data:160",
    MAX(CASE WHEN td.parameter_name = 'OPERATION' THEN t.value END) AS "OPERATION:Data:140"

FROM
    `tabTool Performance` tp
JOIN
    `tabTrial Details` td ON td.parent = tp.name

JOIN (
    SELECT parent, 'COMPETITOR TOOL' AS tool_label, parameter_name, competitor_tool AS value
    FROM `tabTrial Details`
    UNION ALL
    SELECT parent, 'OUR TOOL' AS tool_label, parameter_name, our_tool AS value
    FROM `tabTrial Details`
) t ON t.parent = tp.name AND t.parameter_name = td.parameter_name

WHERE
    tp.docstatus != 2
    AND tp.trial_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
    AND tp.company = %(company)s





GROUP BY
    tp.name,
    t.tool_label

ORDER BY
    tp.name,
    t.tool_label;
